popularStory.headline: My Maternal 20th. Great Grand Aunt, Katherine Menteith, of Strathearn
popularStory.description:
Name: Katherine Menteith, of Strathearn, daughter of Muireadhach II Earl of Menteith and Lady Mary, of Menteith
Born: 1197, in Perthshire, Scotland
Married: about 1220  in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland …

sourceList.title: Legacy NFS Source: Mary Menteith (Countess) - birth-name: Mary Mentieth
Mary Stewart in entry for James Stewart, "Scotland, Births and Baptisms, 1564-1950"

zh.lifeSummary: Katherine Menteith of Strathearn是Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith的女兒，於1197年出生在蘇格蘭培爾。她於大約1216年與Henry Sinclair 6th Baron of Roslin在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1286年在英國蘇格蘭斯可迪夏 波德斯登格拉斯享年89歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾阿福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Katherine Menteith of Strathearn是Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith的女儿，于1197年出生在苏格兰培爾。她于大约1216年与Henry Sinclair 6th Baron of Roslin在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1286年在英国苏格兰斯可迪夏 波德斯登格拉斯享年89岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾阿福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Menteith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the earldom and province of Menteith in Perthshire, named in Gaelic as ‘hill pasture (above) the Teith’, from monadh ‘hill pasture’ + Teith, a river name of obscure origin. This name was introduced to Ulster at the time of the Plantation in the 17th century, where it is now quite numerous in certain areas, particularly Tyrone.

variants.name: Montooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Monteith  .

variants.name: Mantooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish Monteith orMantach, a nickname from Gaelic manntach ‘stammering’(also ‘toothless’ in Irish), of which one early Welsh recorded form isMantath.

variants.name: Montieth
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Monteith   This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: Katherine Menteith of Strathearn was born in 1197, in Perthshire, Scotland as the daughter of Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith. She married Henry Sinclair 6th Baron of Roslin about 1216, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1286, in Dunglass, Scottish Borders, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 89, and was buried in Aberfoyle, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Katherine Menteith of Strathearn est née en 1197, à Perthshire, Écosse, fille de Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith. Elle a épousé Henry Sinclair 6th Baron of Roslin environ 1216, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1286, à Dunglass, Scottish Borders, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Aberfoyle, Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Katherine Menteith of Strathearn wurde 1197 in Perthshire, Scotland, als Tochter von Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith geboren. Sie hat um 1216 in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland Henry Sinclair 6th Baron of Roslin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1286 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Dunglass, Scottish Borders, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Aberfoyle, Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Katherine Menteith of Strathearn è nata il nel 1197 nel Perthshire, Scotland come figlia di Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith. Lei sposato Henry Sinclair 6th Baron of Roslin circa 1216, nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1286, nel Dunglass, Scottish Borders, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolta a Aberfoyle, Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Menteith of Strathearnは1197年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアでMuireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteithの娘として生まれた。約1216年にスコットランドミドロスアンロスリンでHenry Sinclair 6th Baron of Roslinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1286年にイギリススコットランドスコッティッシュ ボルダースダングラスで89歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーフォイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Menteith of Strathearn(은)는 1197년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1216년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 Henry Sinclair 6th Baron of Roslin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1286년 영국 스코틀랜드 스콧이시 볼더스 던글래스에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 압르포일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Katherine Menteith of Strathearn nasceu em 1197, em Perthshire, Scotland filha de Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith. Ela casou-se com Henry Sinclair 6th Baron of Roslin aproximadamente 1216, em Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1286, em Dunglass, Scottish Borders, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 89 anos, e foi sepultada em Aberfoyle, Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Katherine Menteith of Strathearn родилась в 1197 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия. Её отца звали Muireadhach II Menteith The Younger, Earl of Menteith. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Sinclair 6th Baron of Roslin около 1216 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1286 г. в местности дунгласс, скоттиш бордирс, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности абирфоил, пиртшир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Henry Sinclair 6th Baron of Roslin aproximadamente 1216, en Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1286, en Dunglass, Scottish Borders, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultada en Aberfoyle, Perthshire, Scotland.
